description: VOIT plugin library — a curated list of Claude Code plugins /setup can install into a project. Add an entry (id = plugin@marketplace, repo = github owner/repo), then run /setup to pick which to install or update. Everything installs at PROJECT scope only.

plugins.description: Talk like caveman — cut ~75% tokens, keep full technical accuracy.
Immersion-drip language-learning engine that weaves target-language words into ordinary conversation.
Fn-level code index MCP — splits source into per-function files under .splinter/ for token-efficient reads.
Skills/workflow framework — forces plan-before-edit, test-first, two-stage self-review. Adds /brainstorm, /write-plan, /execute-plan.
Anthropic frontend design plugin — higher-quality UI/component output. Most-installed plugin in the official directory.
Upstash Context7 MCP — pulls up-to-date library/framework docs into context so Claude codes against current APIs, not stale memory.
Multi-agent PR/diff review with confidence-based scoring to filter false positives.
Git workflow commands — commit, push, and PR creation.
Flags risky edits and steers toward safer patterns during coding.
Live HUD statusline — context-window health, active tools, running subagents, todo progress. Community favorite (~9k stars).
Delegate to OpenAI Codex from inside Claude Code — adversarial code review, hand off bug fixes via codex-rescue subagent. Needs ChatGPT sub or OpenAI key.
Multi-LLM delegation — offload tasks to Gemini and Qwen for cross-model second opinions and cheap bulk work.
Spec-driven dev workflow — turns a feature idea into Requirements → Design → Tasks → Implementation.
